details.test: Task 1: Book earliest 30-minute college admissions consultation after March 15 3:00 PM
Task 2: Select high school algebra tutoring package under $60/hour and add to cart
Task 3: Choose under-$500 SAT vs ACT test prep program with more practice tests and add to cart
Task 4: Save two qualifying undergraduate scholarships to favorites
Task 5: Create and save an 8-week SAT study plan with daily 1–2 hour sessions
Task 6: Request consultation with best-rated STEM college advisor with lowest hourly rate
Task 7: Register for a free weekday evening college essay webinar next month
Task 8: Build college application support package under $1,000 with three specific services
Task 9: Save a FAFSA guide and submit a financial aid question via contact form
